Video.summary: When a rich girl steps into a poor school for the first time, her glamorous lifestyle shocks everyone! From luxury gadgets to creative DIY crafts, watch how rich, poor, and giga-rich students face hilarious challenges and surprising twists. Who will win the ultimate school showdown? Find out in this fun and entertaining story full of secrets, style, and school drama!
Video.grandparentTitle: Rich Girl’s First Day at a Poor School: Poor, Rich and Giga Rich Students!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: What happens when luxury meets resourcefulness in an art battle? We're pitting the most expensive, high-end art supplies against clever, everyday cheap crafts! Watch the ultimate creative showdown as we try to make masterpieces from two completely different worlds. Will the pricey professional tools win, or will the ingenious budget-friendly hacks take the crown? Prepare for stunning results, shocking surprises, and a whole lot of creative fun
Video.grandparentTitle: Art Supplies: Rich and Poor! The Ultimate Creative Showdown
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: What if your food had a personality? In our craziest challenge yet, we're bringing meals to life! Watch the ultimate cooking showdown between Me, my Grandma, and a Professional Chef. But there's a twist! Every dish we create has a wild, personified story. Who will create the most hilarious food character? Get ready for epic recipes, crazy characters, and a battle of creativity you won't forget!
Video.grandparentTitle: If Food Were People! The Ultimate Cooking Showdown
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: It’s time for a crazy food challenge! Watch as we tackle the Geometric Food Challenge, creating perfectly shaped dishes, and then dive into a wild cooking battle: No Hands vs One Hand vs Two Hands! Who will cook the best meal with the least amount of hands? And which geometric creations will taste the best? It's a hilarious and tasty adventure of skill, creativity, and chaos!
Video.grandparentTitle: Geometric Food: No Hands, One Hand and Two Hands Cooking Showdown
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the ultimate food challenge! We’re creating Giant, Medium and Tiny versions of your favorite foods while battling it out with dazzling gold and silver ingredients! From massive burgers to shimmering silver pizzas, it’s a fun, epic showdown of size and color. Who will win the tastiest, most creative creation? Watch to find out!
Video.grandparentTitle: Giant, Medium or Tiny Food? Gold and Silver Color Showdown!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the most sensory and suspenseful food challenge yet! We're combining two epic games into one. First, the tense "Bite, Lick, or Nothing" challenge will have us on the edge of our seats! Then, we dive into a mesmerizing One-Color Food ASMR battle—will it be a vibrant green feast or a pretty in pink paradise?
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Food Challenge! Bite, Lick, Nothing and One-Color ASMR
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the most hilarious and messy eating challenges ever! We're putting our skills to the test in two crazy battles. First, can we even eat with no hands? Then, we're messing with our minds in a Big Plate and Small Plate illusion challenge! It's a full-on showdown of strategy, silliness, and serious spills. Who will master the one-hand technique? Who will be fooled by the plate size? Watch to find out and get ready to laugh!
Video.grandparentTitle: Extreme Eating Challenges! No Hands and Plate Size Showdown
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the ultimate art showdown! Watch as we go head-to-head in a 3D Pen vs Pancake Art Challenge, where creativity meets deliciousness! Who will create the most mind-blowing masterpiece to win a $1,000 prize? Plus, stick around for some amazing TikTok hacks, viral art tips, and parenting secrets to level up your life!
Video.grandparentTitle: 3D Pen and Pancake Art Challenge! Best Art Wins $1,000!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Got a sweet tooth but stuck in class? We've got you covered!This is your ultimate guide to becoming a candy ninja! Discover the most brilliant and sneaky life hacks to sneak your favorite treats anywhere—especially into school. Learn clever hiding spots, genius disguises, and pro-level strategies to enjoy your candy without getting caught. Master the art of the sweet sneak! Just don't blame us if you get caught...
Video.grandparentTitle: Secret Candy Missions! How to Sneak Candy Everywhere
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Who will survive the longest? Who picks the tastiest meals? And who totally fails? Grab a snack (maybe in YOUR favorite color!) and enjoy the fun!
Video.grandparentTitle: 24 Hours Eating Only One Color Food! Pink World, Bubble Gum Battle and Last-to-stop Color Challenge
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Ready for the ultimate creativity showdown? In this video, we're diving into the world of Rich vs. Broke challenges! We'll show you amazing art hacks using expensive supplies versus super cool tricks you can do with everyday stuff you have at home.
Video.grandparentTitle: Poor and Rich Art Challenge! Who Is Better? Cool Drawing Hacks And Diy Ideas
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the most hilarious and messy food challenges ever! In this video, we're taking on two epic food battles that will have you laughing out loud!
Video.grandparentTitle: Crazy Food Challenges! One-color Meal and No-hands Eating!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Welcome to the ultimate Barbie makeover and school craft showdown! In this fun mash-up, we’re blending Popular Barbie vs Dark Barbie school crafts with the dramatic and creative transformations of Rich vs Poor Barbie dolls!
Video.grandparentTitle: Popular Barbie or Dark Barbie? Rich and Poor Doll Makeover
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready to unleash your creativity with the best polymer clay, nanotape, and cardboard crafts! Whether you’re looking for fun DIY projects, cool room decorations, or clever handmade gifts, this video has it all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brilliant Polymer Clay, Nanotape and Cardboard Crafts! Easy DIY Ideas
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the funniest school mash-up ever! In this mega-compilation, we’re diving into High School You or Child You, exploring all the Types of Students in Class, and testing out some unbelievable DIY school hacks every parent and student will love!
Video.grandparentTitle: High School You and Child You! Types Of Students, School Hacks and Funny Relatable Moments
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Do you like 3D pen and hot glue crafts? This video is exactly for you then! Here you can find a lot of fantastic 3D pen and hot glue ideas, DIY hacks and artistic crafts.
Video.grandparentTitle: Amazing 3D Pen Hacks and DIY Jewelry Mini Decor
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Life is made of rules, but sometimes, they’re just meant to be broken. Have you ever broken a rule at school or at home? Don’t worry we can keep a secret.
Video.grandparentTitle: Breaking 100 Rules In 24 Hours || Sneak Candy Everywhere!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: What would you want one hundred of? Chocolate bars? Dollar bills? Everything in moderation, right?
Video.grandparentTitle: 1000 Coats of Tattoos, Lashes, Makeup! Funny Dare Game
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Don't you just love a happy ending? True love will always find a way. But who do you think Grace should have picked? Chris or Jake:?
Video.grandparentTitle: Omg! Nerd Falls In Love With Popular Student || Cute High School Love Story
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: As a parent, you’ll always do your best for your children. But sometimes, you need a little help. Luckily, we have the best parenting gadgets to help life easier. What was your favorite?
Video.grandparentTitle: Genius Gadgets For Parents And Their Kids || Funny Parenting Hacks And Smart Crafts
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: How can absolutely different girls live together in one room? Let's find out! They need an extreme transformation of their room and maybe they will become friends. What would your dream bedroom look like?
Video.grandparentTitle: Incredible Room Makeover Hacks
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: It's time for Extreme Drawing Challenge. Two contests will compete for one million dollars. The loser... will be punished. Let's get started! Think you could win our extreme drawing challenge? Do you know any DIY painting hacks? What would your masterpiece look like?
Video.grandparentTitle: Funny Color Drawing Challenge!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Life can be pretty different depending on how many zeroes are in your bank account. But one thing money can't buy is a parent's love. What cute things do your parents do for you?
Video.grandparentTitle: Giga Expensive Vs Cheap Hacks For Future Parents
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Sometimes, our parents don't like change. But with these handy gadgets, life can be a whole a lot easier. What was your favourite gadget and why?
Video.grandparentTitle: Viral Life Hacks And Smart Tricks For Parents!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Being a parent is tough, that’s why you sometimes need some help. Hopefully these hacks can make life easier. What’s the best thing your parent does?
Video.grandparentTitle: Must Have Gadgets And Diy Ideas For Cool Parents
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: You don’t need a fancy costume to be scary at Halloween. Just a little imagination and some creativity. What was your favourite makeup idea?

Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Having a roommate can be tough. Especially if you’re neat and they're messy… but a unicorn and a mermaid? Who would you rather share a bunk bed with? Wish you had a secret room under your bed you could escape to?

Video.summary: School can be tough and that’s before you try and make friends. It’s like a popularity contest at times. Do you recognise any of these students at your school?

Video.summary: It doesn’t matter if you’re rich or poor, school is tough. What’s your best hack to help get you through the school day?

Video.summary: Having a billionaire as a parent would be awesome, but a family isn’t built on money, it’s built on love. What cute things do your parents do for you?

Video.summary: Is your stomach growling? Perhaps it’s time for a snack. Bubble gum or chocolate? What would you prefer? Or hot or cold? But be careful what you reach for, it may be gummy goodness disguised as grub!

Video.summary: Life isn’t about the number of zeroes in your bank account, it’s about being happy. But let’s be honest, it would be fun to be rich. What was your favourite part of our budget challenge?

Video.summary: Life is pretty different depending on the amount of zeroes in your bank account. But remember, money doesn’t buy happiness. But it does buy a lot of cool things. If you were giga rich for even one day, what would you buy first?
